name: Juicy
description: Easily achieve sweet and delicious pouts with this vibrant lip tint available in 35 gorgeous shades. Highly pigmented, the color stays on all day long! Can be used for a gentle gradated look or eye-catching full lips.

name: Glasting
description: romand's Glasting Color Gloss offer sheer color to lips with a high-shine finish. Infused with nourishing essential oils and high-viscosity wax, the lightweight lip gloss keeps lips moisturized without leaving a sticky feeling. Comes in thirteen shades.

name: Fudge
description: Smooth like butter, this fudge-y lip tint blends well onto lips for a matte and gradated finish. It contains macadamia integrifolia seed oil to moisturize lips. Long-lasting lip tint come in sixteen unique shades to create different kinds of lip looks!

name: Velvet
description: Create a "my lips but better" look with this matte lip tint, which offers a blurring effect and velvet finish for a dreamy look. The lightweight texture feels soft and comfortable on skin as it adheres smoothly all day long. Comes in twenty-five shades.
